있습니다."},{"kind":"plain","left":30.6,"top":528.36,"width":523.22,"height":12,"fontSize":11.04,"lineHeight":12,"fontWeight":600,"text":"○ 협력사에서는 반드시 전자서명 완료 후에 작업에 착수해 주시기 바랍니다(예정 공사착수일 이후 서명 시 서명일이 공사착수일)."},{"kind":"plain","left":30.6,"top":544.92,"width":515.53,"height":12,"fontSize":11.04,"lineHeight":12,"fontWeight":600,"text":"○ 향후 수급사업자의 귀책, 기존 계약범위에 포함 등의 사유로 추가/변경작업이 아닌 것으로 객관적으로 확인될 경우 본 서면은"},{"kind":"plain","left":30.6,"top":556.89,"width":46.97,"height":12,"fontSize":11.04,"lineHeight":12,"fontWeight":500,"text":"무효입니다."}]}]}</script>
  <div class="template-clone template-clone--pdf-positioned-v28">
    <style>
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v22,
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v27,
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v28 {
        width: fit-content;
        margin: 0 auto;
        background: transparent;
        color: #111827;
        font-family: "Malgun Gothic", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", sans-serif;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-page {
        position: relative;
        margin: 0 auto 16px;
        background: #ffffff;
        border: 0;
        box-sizing: content-box;
        overflow: hidden;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-frame-layer {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        pointer-events: none;
        user-select: none;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text-layer {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        pointer-events: auto;
        user-select: text;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-precision-stage {
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        top: 0;
        transform-origin: top left;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule {
        position: absolute;
        background: #0f172a;
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule--v {
        top: 0;
        width: 1.15px;
        transform: translateX(-0.5px);
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule--h {
        left: 0;
        height: 1.15px;
        transform: translateY(-0.5px);
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text {
        position: absolute;
        color: #111827;
        white-space: pre;
        letter-spacing: -0.01em;
        overflow: visible;
        font-weight: 500;
        -webkit-text-stroke: 0.15px currentColor;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text--label {
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text .template-clone__pdf-inline-value,
      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text .template-clone__pdf-block-value {
        display: inline;
        min-height: 0;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-line {
        display: inline-flex;
        width: 100%;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 6px;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-line-code {
        display: inline-block;
        min-width: 24px;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-options {
        display: inline-flex;
        gap: 8px;
        align-items: center;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-option {
        display: inline-flex;
        gap: 3px;
        align-items: center;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-check {
        display: inline-block;
        width: 9px;
        height: 9px;
        border: 1px solid currentColor;
        box-sizing: border-box;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-check--checked::after {
        content: "";
        display: block;
        width: 5px;
        height: 5px;
        margin: 1px;
        background: currentColor;
      }
    </style>

      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v22,
      .template-clone--pdf-positioned-v27,

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-page {

        margin: 0 auto 16px;

        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        overflow: hidden;

        user-select: none;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text-layer {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        pointer-events: auto;
        user-select: text;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-precision-stage {
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        top: 0;
        transform-origin: top left;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule {
        position: absolute;
        background: #0f172a;
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule--v {
        top: 0;
        width: 1.15px;
        transform: translateX(-0.5px);
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-rule--h {
        left: 0;
        height: 1.15px;
        transform: translateY(-0.5px);
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text {
        position: absolute;
        color: #111827;
        white-space: pre;
        letter-spacing: -0.01em;
        overflow: visible;
        font-weight: 500;
        -webkit-text-stroke: 0.15px currentColor;

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text--label {
        font-weight: 600;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text .template-clone__pdf-inline-value,
      .template-clone__pdf-replica-text .template-clone__pdf-block-value {
        display: inline;
        min-height: 0;
      }

        display: inline-flex;
        width: 100%;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        gap: 6px;
        white-space: nowrap;

      .template-clone__pdf-status-line-code {

      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-options {
        display: inline-flex;
        gap: 8px;
        align-items: center;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }

      .template-clone__pdf-status-option {

      .template-clone__pdf-check {

        height: 9px;

        margin: 1px;

      <div class="template-clone__pdf-replica-text template-clone__pdf-replica-text--label" data-template-line="26" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="김종현 전자서명 완료" style="left:108.24px;top:166.14px;width:97.08px;height:13.3px;font-size:12.24px;line-height:13.3px;font-weight:600;">김종현 전자서명 완료</div>

      <div class="template-clone__pdf-replica-text" data-template-line="29" data-template-source="text_layer" style="left:108.24px;top:184.14px;width:209.17px;height:13.3px;font-size:12.24px;line-height:13.3px;font-weight:500;">B1F 피난안전구역,연결통로 환기시설 추가공사</div>
      <div class="template-clone__pdf-replica-text template-clone__pdf-replica-text--label" data-template-line="30" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="공사 내용" style="left:37.11px;top:200.91px;width:66.12px;height:19.95px;font-size:18px;line-height:19.95px;font-weight:600;">1. 공 사 내 용*</div>
      <div class="template-clone__pdf-replica-text" data-template-line="31" data-template-source="text_layer" style="left:158.43px;top:200.91px;width:253.65px;height:19.95px;font-size:18px;line-height:19.95px;font-weight:500;">1) B1F 101,102동 피난안전구역, 연결통로 환기시설 시공</div>
      <div class="template-clone__pdf-replica-text" data-template-line="32" data-template-source="text_layer" style="left:158.43px;top:214.21px;width:170.31px;height:13.3px;font-size:12.24px;line-height:13.3px;font-weight:500;">2) 전열교환기 설치 - 급배기 덕트시공</div>
      <div class="template-clone__pdf-replica-text" data-template-line="33" data-template-source="text_layer" style="left:158.43px;top:229.77px;width:60px;height:13.3px;font-size:12.24px;line-height:13.3px;font-weight:500;">*전열교환기 :</div>
      <div class="template-clone__pdf-replica-text" data-template-line="34" data-template-source="text_layer" style="left:161.97px;top:243.07px;width:117.4px;height:13.3px;font-size:12.24px;line-height:13.3px;font-weight:500;">250CMH(1대) - 240,000원</div>
      <div class="template-clone__pdf-replica-text template-clone__pdf-replica-text--label" data-template-line="35" data-template-source="text_layer" data-template-label="하도급 대금" style="left:313.65px;top:243.07px;width:74.38px;height:13.3px;font-size:12.24px;line-height:13.3px;font-weight:600;">1-2. 하도급 대금</div>
      <div class="template-clone__pdf-replica-text" data-template-line="36" data-template-source="text_layer" style="left:37.11px;top:249.72px;width:104.35px;height:13.3px;font-size:12.24px;line-height:13.3px;font-weight:500;">1-1. 대표수량, 단가 등*</div>
      <div class="template-clone__pdf-replica-text" data-template-line="37" data-template-source="text_layer" style="left:313.65px;top:250.42px;width:88.83px;height:19.25px;font-size:17.71px;line-height:19.25px;font-weight:500;">(단위 : 원, 직접비)*</div>
      <div class="template-clone__pdf-replica-text" data-template-line="38" data-template-source="text_layer" style="left:415.02px;top:250.42px;width:42.93px;height:19.25px;font-size:17.71px;line-height:19.25px;font-weight:500;">8,190,000</div>
